description: CISA KEV catalog flags Log4Shell (CVE-2021-44228) on a CMDB asset Alex owns. Phase E enrichment publishes an enrichment.kev.match signal → major-incident-response fires with severity:'critical'. Outcome probe checks for SNOW P1 + CISA citation in the worknote.

payload.shortDescription: Apache Log4j2 contains a vulnerability where JNDI features used in configuration, log messages, and parameters do not protect against attacker-controlled LDAP and other JNDI related endpoints.

steps.description: major-incident-response received the KEV match signal

expectedOutcomes: signal-router routes enrichment.kev.match → major-incident-response (severity upgraded to critical)
reviewer-worker is invoked because CVSS 10.0 trips the Phase E critical-CVSS gate
outcome verifier composite probe inspects the run for a SNOW P1 + CISA citation
